summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FlowIQ premium fintech-level UI upgrade. All premium features successfully implemented and working correctly including bento grid layout, dark gradient hero card, animated numbers, rounded chart bars, glassmorphism navigation, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads with premium bento grid layout (12-column grid system)
Hero balance card displays with dark gradient background and animated number counters
Monthly spending bar chart renders with rounded bars and custom tooltips (6 bars)
Category donut chart displays correctly with legend (5 pie sectors)
Cashflow prediction card shows alert/on-track status badges
Quick insights section displays 3 insight preview cards with proper styling
Smooth navigation transitions between Dashboard, Insights, and Upload pages
Insights page displays 5 premium insight cards with color-coded badges
Spending personality card renders with premium gradient background (violet theme)
Financial health score card shows circular progress indicator
Upload page features drag-drop zone with premium styling and sidebar cards
Mobile responsive layout works correctly with functional mobile navigation menu
Premium card shadows and hover lift effects implemented (4 premium cards)
Skeleton loaders present for loading states
Premium typography hierarchy with Manrope headings and Inter body text
Pill-style navigation with glassmorphism background effects
All micro-interactions and hover effects functioning properly
